name: sap-note-search-mcp
description: MCP server for searching SAP Notes/KB articles using SAP Passport authentication and Playwright automation

scripts.serve:http:debug: LOG_LEVEL=debug HTTP_PORT=3123 AUTO_START=true DEBUG_START=true node dist/http-mcp-server.js
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:http: npm run build && npm run serve:http
scripts.start:http:debug: npm run build && npm run serve:http:debug
scripts.test:auth:debug: npm run build && HEADFUL=true LOG_LEVEL=debug node test/test-auth.js
scripts.test:mcp:debug: npm run build && LOG_LEVEL=debug DOCKER_ENV=true node test/test-mcp-server.js
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:api && npm run test:mcp
